query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.mediaCount, m.id as media_id, m.filename, m.thumbnailUrl, m.url 
FROM projects p 
LEFT JOIN media m ON m.projectId = p.id 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%CIP222%' 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.mediaCount, m.id as media_id, m.filename, m.thumbnailUrl, m.url 
FROM projects p 
LEFT JOIN media m ON m.projectId = p.id 
WHERE p.name LIKE '%CIP222%' 
LIMIT 20;
